2603.23783.title: Probabilistic Geometric Alignment via Bayesian Latent Transport for Domain-Adaptive Foundation Models
2603.23783.paper_summary: Adapting large-scale foundation models to new domains with limited supervision remains a fundamental challenge due to latent distribution mismatch, unstable optimization dynamics, and miscalibrated uncertainty propagation. This paper introduces an uncertainty-aware probabilistic latent transport framework that formulates domain adaptation as a stochastic geometric alignment problem in representation space. A Bayesian transport operator is proposed to redistribute latent probability mass along Wasserstein-type geodesic trajectories, while a PAC-Bayesian regularization mechanism constrains posterior model complexity to mitigate catastrophic overfitting. The proposed formulation yields theoretical guarantees on convergence stability, loss landscape smoothness, and sample efficiency under distributional shift. Empirical analyses demonstrate substantial reduction in latent manifold discrepancy, accelerated transport energy decay, and improved covariance calibration compared with deterministic fine-tuning and adversarial domain adaptation baselines. Furthermore, bounded posterior uncertainty evolution indicates enhanced probabilistic reliability during cross-domain transfer. By establishing a principled connection between stochastic optimal transport geometry and statistical generalization theory, the proposed framework provides new insights into robust adaptation of modern foundation architectures operating in heterogeneous environments. These findings suggest that uncertainty-aware probabilistic alignment constitutes a promising paradigm for reliable transfer learning in next-generation deep representation systems.
2603.23783.paper_summary_zh: 將大型基礎模型適應於有限監督的新領域仍然是一個基本挑戰，原因在於潛在分佈不匹配、不穩定的優化動態以及不正確的不確定性傳播。<lb/>本文介紹了一種不確定性感知的概率潛在傳輸框架，將領域適應表述為表示空間中的隨機幾何對齊問題。<lb/>提出了一種貝葉斯傳輸運算子，旨在沿著Wasserstein型測地線軌跡重新分配潛在概率質量，同時PAC-貝葉斯正則化機制限制後驗模型的複雜性，以減輕災難性過擬合。<lb/>所提出的公式在分佈變化下對收斂穩定性、損失景觀平滑性和樣本效率提供了理論保證。<lb/>實證分析顯示，與確定性微調和對抗性領域適應基準相比，潛在流形差異顯著減少，傳輸能量衰減加速，協方差校準改善。<lb/>此外，有界的後驗不確定性演變表明在跨領域轉移過程中增強了概率可靠性。<lb/>通過建立隨機最優傳輸幾何與統計泛化理論之間的原則性聯繫，所提出的框架為在異構環境中穩健適應現代基礎架構提供了新的見解。<lb/>這些發現表明，不確定性感知的概率對齊構成了下一代深度表示系統中可靠轉移學習的有前景的範式。
2603.23783.author: Kuepon Aueawatthanaphisut et.al.
